data.body: S3 (94f9) CLAIMED. Config schema change done (backend field + _as_choice coercer) — 5 config tests GREEN. Registry tests authored RED-first (8 fail NotImplementedError, right reason). Held out oracle: test_backend_registry_edges.py (idempotent/conflict/reset/unknown/equivalence/teeth). Implementer sees only test_backend_registry.py (2 happy) + stub _backend_registry.py + backend_support.py. Teeth-test tension from S3 review resolved by design: teeth constructs Config directly (dataclasses.replace) to bypass load-time _as_choice coercer.
